name: audit-pack-emit --format tarball writes bundle.tar containing the json + markdown + html bundles per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format tarball --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && [ -f out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.tar ] && tar -tf out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.tar | sort | tr '\n' ',' > listing.txt && grep -q 'bundle.html,bundle.json,bundle.md' listing.txt && echo ok 1>&2
